## Highlights

- **New `/ginee-address-review #<PR>` skill** (also `@team-lead address-review #<PR>` for adapters without AgentSkills). Ingests review comments + reviews on an open PR — sits between Phase 7 (internal SA review) and Phase 8 (user accept) for PRs exposed to external reviewers.
- **7-step procedure** — fetch comments + reviews → deduplicate by `thread-id` → route per `local/bindings.md § Source-of-truth ownership` → **surface consolidated plan table for approval** (forced-interactive, no exception in `auto:` mode) → dispatch specialists in parallel returning fix-track patches or reply-track text → squash fixes into one cycle commit + push → post per-thread replies + one sticky cycle summary.
- **Lossless coverage** — every plan-table thread MUST end the cycle as fix OR reply. No silent drops.
- **Idempotent** — re-invocation skips already-addressed threads unless a newer reviewer comment landed.
- **HTML markers** — `<!-- ginee:review-reply r=<thread-id> -->` (per-thread) + `<!-- ginee:review-cycle n=<N> -->` (sticky cycle summary).
- **Skill count 11 → 12.** Cheat-sheet rows added to all four adapters.

**Full Changelog:** https://github.com/kostiantyn-matsebora/ginee/compare/v0.8.0...v0.9.0
